fields.title: Thread tool renderers for TUI display
fields.description: Create TUI renderers for find_thread and read_thread tool results that display cleanly in the terminal interface.
fields.design: Create renderer functions in extensions/tau/src/thread/renderer.ts following tau patterns (see memory/renderer.ts). find_thread renderer: show query, count summary, list of matches with title, id, cwd, message count, relative update time, short preview, and 'more available' indicator. read_thread renderer: show thread id, optional goal, title/cwd/updated metadata, markdown transcript body in scrollable container if long. Use Text and Markdown components from @mariozechner/pi-tui. Follow single result-focused cell pattern, avoid duplicating call/result cells. Use theme colors consistently.
